name: Terminal clipboard repair

issues.title: Bug: Ctrl+C and Ctrl+V are completely non-functional in the terminal — #155 removed the only paste path; Ctrl+C copy was never implemented

description: Single-issue follow-up to v0.5.6. Restores terminal copy/paste: explicit Ctrl+V/Ctrl+Shift+V handler (reads clipboard, xterm.paste()), Windows-convention Ctrl+C (copy-on-selection / SIGINT otherwise), and a capture-phase paste suppressor that structurally prevents the #155 double-paste regression.
note: Used the no-dependency navigator.clipboard path; tauri-plugin-clipboard-manager deferred (needs elevated pnpm install — same #161 reparse-point blocker). Smoke-tested on the dev machine before tagging, unlike v0.5.6.
